# AGENTS.md

<!-- BEGIN llm_resource_tally v1.0.0 (managed block — regenerated by `install`; edits below will be overwritten) -->
## LLM resource accounting
A git hook auto-records the tokens/model each commit costs to `.llm_resource_tally/` (measured
from the session transcript — never hand-edit or hand-count it). **After cloning, run
`python3 .llm_resource_tally/tool install` once** to arm it (git-local config isn't cloned). Non-committing work is swept
by `python3 .llm_resource_tally/tool reconcile`, automatic when the Claude session-end hook is wired.
<!-- END llm_resource_tally -->
